revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Col-float/styles.css}} Side-by-side columns, based on [[Cascading Style Sheets#Float and clear|CSS float]]. This has the advantage of more cross-device-accessible behaviour, as (unlike HTML <table>s) they will wrap on display windows too narrow to show them side-by-side. == Parameters == All optional and applicable to {{tl|Col-float}}{{\}}{{tl|Start col-float}} and {{tl|Col-float-break}}{{\}}{{tl|Break col-float}} except '''''firstcol''''': ; ''firstcol'' {{nobold|{{resize|90%|(with Col-float or Start col-float only)}}}} ; ''nextcol'' ; width : Width of the next – or, with Col-float/Start col-float, the first – column. IE-based browsers require a specified width, so defaults to 30.0em. ; ''class'' : For any [[Cascading Style Sheets|styling]] defined using [[Cascading Style Sheets#Selector|classes]]. ; ''style'' : For any additional styling. {{tl|Col-float}} can be used with numbered parameters for columns (i.e. {{para|1}} is the first column, {{para|2}} is the second, and so on). However, lists have to be preceded with <nowiki/> and a newline, and tables have to use {{Tn|!}}. == Example section (from [[Hydrolastic]]) == === With {{tl|Col-float-break}} ===
{{col-float}} '''Cars using the [[Hydrolastic]] suspension system:''' * [[BMC ADO16|BMC 1100]] * [[Mini]] (from 1964 to 1971) * [[Austin 1800]] * [[Austin America]] (from 1968 to 1971) * [[Austin Maxi]] (until March 1978) * [[Austin 3-Litre]] * [[MG 1100]] (from 1962 to 1968) * [[Morris Nomad]] {{col-float-break}} '''Cars using the [[Hydragas]] suspension system:''' * [[Austin Allegro]] * [[Leyland Princess]] * [[Austin Ambassador]] * [[Austin Maxi]] (from March 1978 onwards) * [[Austin Metro]] & [[Rover Metro]] * [[Rover 100]] {{col-float-end}}
{{col-float}} '''Cars using the [[Hydrolastic]] suspension system:''' * [[BMC ADO16|BMC 1100]] * [[Mini]] (from 1964 to 1971) * [[Austin 1800]] * [[Austin America]] (from 1968 to 1971) * [[Austin Maxi]] (until March 1978) * [[Austin 3-Litre]] * [[MG 1100]] (from 1962 to 1968) * [[Morris Nomad]] {{col-float-break}} '''Cars using the [[Hydragas]] suspension system:''' * [[Austin Allegro]] * [[Leyland Princess]] * [[Austin Ambassador]] * [[Austin Maxi]] (from March 1978 onwards) * [[Austin Metro]] & [[Rover Metro]] * [[Rover 100]] {{col-float-end}} === With numbered parameters ===
{{col-float |1= '''Cars using the [[Hydrolastic]] suspension system:''' * [[BMC ADO16|BMC 1100]] * [[Mini]] (from 1964 to 1971) * [[Austin 1800]] * [[Austin America]] (from 1968 to 1971) * [[Austin Maxi]] (until March 1978) * [[Austin 3-Litre]] * [[MG 1100]] (from 1962 to 1968) * [[Morris Nomad]] |2= '''Cars using the [[Hydragas]] suspension system:''' * [[Austin Allegro]] * [[Leyland Princess]] * [[Austin Ambassador]] * [[Austin Maxi]] (from March 1978 onwards) * [[Austin Metro]] & [[Rover Metro]] * [[Rover 100]] }}
{{col-float |1= '''Cars using the [[Hydrolastic]] suspension system:''' * [[BMC ADO16|BMC 1100]] * [[Mini]] (from 1964 to 1971) * [[Austin 1800]] * [[Austin America]] (from 1968 to 1971) * [[Austin Maxi]] (until March 1978) * [[Austin 3-Litre]] * [[MG 1100]] (from 1962 to 1968) * [[Morris Nomad]] |2= '''Cars using the [[Hydragas]] suspension system:''' * [[Austin Allegro]] * [[Leyland Princess]] * [[Austin Ambassador]] * [[Austin Maxi]] (from March 1978 onwards) * [[Austin Metro]] & [[Rover Metro]] * [[Rover 100]] }} == See also == {{Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Multi-column templates]] }}

This has the advantage of more cross-device-accessible behaviour, as (unlike HTML <table>s) they will wrap on display windows too narrow to show them side-by-side. == Parameters == All optional and applicable to {{tl|Col-float}}{{\}}{{tl|Start col-float}} and {{tl|Col-float-break}}{{\}}{{tl|Break col-float}} except '''''firstcol''''': ; ''firstcol'' {{nobold|{{resize|90%|(with Col-float or Start col-float only)}}}} ; ''nextcol'' ; width : Width of the next – or, with Col-float/Start col-float, the first – column. IE-based browsers require a specified width, so defaults to 30.0em. ; ''class'' : For any [[:en:Cascading Style Sheets|styling]] defined using [[Cascading Style Sheets#Selector|classes]]. ; ''style'' : For any additional styling. {{tl|Col-float}} can be used with numbered parameters for columns (i.e. {{para|1}} is the first column, {{para|2}} is the second, and so on). revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Col-float/styles.css}} Side-by-side columns, based on [[Cascading Style Sheets#Float and clear|CSS float]]. This has the advantage of more cross-device-accessible behaviour, as (unlike HTML <table>s) they will wrap on display windows too narrow to show them side-by-side. == Parameters == All optional and applicable to {{tl|Col-float}}{{\}}{{tl|Start col-float}} and {{tl|Col-float-break}}{{\}}{{tl|Break col-float}} except '''''firstcol''''': ; ''firstcol'' {{nobold|{{resize|90%|(with Col-float or Start col-float only)}}}} ; ''nextcol'' ; width : Width of the next – or, with Col-float/Start col-float, the first – column. IE-based browsers require a specified width, so defaults to 30.0em. ; ''class'' : For any [[:en:Cascading Style Sheets|styling]] defined using [[Cascading Style Sheets#Selector|classes]]. ; ''style'' : For any additional styling. {{tl|Col-float}} can be used with numbered parameters for columns (i.e. {{para|1}} is the first column, {{para|2}} is the second, and so on). However, lists have to be preceded with <nowiki/> and a newline, and tables have to use {{Tn|!}}. == Example section (from [[:en:Hydrolastic|Hydrolastic]]) == === With {{tl|Col-float-break}} ===

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Col-float/styles.css}} Side-by-side columns, based on [[Cascading Style Sheets#Float and clear|CSS float]]. This has the advantage of more cross-device-accessible behaviour, as (unlike HTML <table>s) they will wrap on display windows too narrow to show them side-by-side. == Parameters == All optional and applicable to {{tl|Col-float}}{{\}}{{tl|Start col-float}} and {{tl|Col-float-break}}{{\}}{{tl|Break col-float}} except '''''firstcol''''': ; ''firstcol'' {{nobold|{{resize|90%|(with Col-float or Start col-float only)}}}} ; ''nextcol'' ; width : Width of the next – or, with Col-float/Start col-float, the first – column. IE-based browsers require a specified width, so defaults to 30.0em. ; ''class'' : For any [[:en:Cascading Style Sheets|styling]] defined using [[Cascading Style Sheets#Selector|classes]]. ; ''style'' : For any additional styling. {{tl|Col-float}} can be used with numbered parameters for columns (i.e. {{para|1}} is the first column, {{para|2}} is the second, and so on). However, lists have to be preceded with <nowiki/> and a newline, and tables have to use {{Tn|!}}. == Example section (from [[:en:Hydrolastic|Hydrolastic]]) == === With {{tl|Col-float-break}} ===
{{col-float}} '''Cars using the [[:en:Hydrolastic|Hydrolastic]] suspension system:''' * [[:en:BMC ADO16|BMC 1100]] * [[:en:Mini|Mini]] (from 1964 to 1971) * [[:en:Austin 1800|Austin 1800]] * [[:en:Austin America|Austin America]] (from 1968 to 1971) * [[:en:Austin Maxi|Austin Maxi]] (until March 1978) * [[:en:Austin 3-Litre|Austin 3-Litre]] * [[:en:MG 1100|MG 1100]] (from 1962 to 1968) * [[:en:Morris Nomad|Morris Nomad]] {{col-float-break}} '''Cars using the [[:en:Hydragas|Hydragas]] suspension system:''' * [[:en:Austin Allegro|Austin Allegro]] * [[:en:Leyland Princess|Leyland Princess]] * [[:en:Austin Ambassador|Austin Ambassador]] * [[:en:Austin Maxi|Austin Maxi]] (from March 1978 onwards) * [[:en:Austin Metro|Austin Metro]] & [[:en:Rover Metro|Rover Metro]] * [[:en:Rover 100|Rover 100]] {{col-float-end}}
